subcodes.first_line: The Divine Lote-Tree proclaimeth: There is none other God but Me, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. I created you that ye might know Me, if ye be of them that know [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سدره المنتهی تنطق انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن القیوم خلقتکم لعرفانی ان انتم تعرفون
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @knowledge; recognition of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @purpose; goal of creation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
